reviews.comment:
Motel de ruta! Buena atención, estado y servicio aceptable, muy buena gastronomía! Si tu idea es parar una o dos noches durante un viaje, resulta sumamente recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Roadside motel! Good service, acceptable condition and amenities, very good food! If you're planning to stop for one or two nights during a trip, it's highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbG92RndBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Lindo lugar con baños limpios y equipados. Buena cafeteria con excelente atención a pesar de la gran concurrencia.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Nice place with clean and well-equipped restrooms. Good cafeteria with excellent service despite being very busy.

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio. Muy buena atención. Con restaurante. Una opción muy buena para descansar de ese viaje largo o para cargar combustible a diario.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station. Very good service. With a restaurant. A great option for resting after a long trip or for daily fueling.

reviews.comment:
Agradable estacion.
Amplia playa, buena atencion de los playeros.
Aire comprimido en funcionamiento y baños limpios.
El minishop estaba abriendo recien a las 0700, amable atencion de las chicas. Hay wifi y agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
Pleasant resort.
Large beach, good service from the beach attendants.
Working air conditioning and clean restrooms.
The mini-shop was just opening at 7:00 AM, friendly service from the staff. There is Wi-Fi and hot water.
